title: Protein secretion efficiency of construct in Chlamydomonas reinhardtii with fluorescent protein
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"73b2f","text":"This protocol describe how to asess secretion efficiency of diferrent constructs in Chalmydomonas reinhardtii, using a fluorescent protein. Colonies are picked from transformation plate and inoculated on TAP media for growth. A high number of colonies is picked to avoid bias on colonie picking. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":84,"length":25}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"di19n","text":"Cell cultures in 96 well plates should ideally be cultivated at high orbital shaking (\u003e800RPM) to avoid suboptimal growth. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"3evu4","text":"Separate 96 well plates","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7kga3","text":"Prepare sufficient media ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dru14","text":"Separate gas exchangable seal ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Pippete 500 µL of TAP media to each well of a 96 deep-well plate Pick single colonies with autoclavated pippete tips or teeth cleaning twigs. Add to the wells Cover plate with a gas exchangeable seal (Breathe-Easy®, Sigma-Aldrich®) Place plates on a rotary shaker (150 RPM) under constant illumination (50 µmol photons/m 2 s ), at 25 ºC for 7 days undetermined, TAP media per well Undetermined, growth temperature Low orbital shaker speed are sufficient for cell growth. Nevertheless, microtiter plate shakers can be used and enhance cell growth.

Remove seal and transfer 100 µL of culture to fluorescence reading in a clear bottom 96-well plate (Corning Costar, Tewksbury, MA, USA). Centrifuge the 96 deep-well plate at 3000xg for 10 min Transfer 100 uL of supernatant to fluorescence reading in a clear bottom 96-well plate (Corning Costar, Tewksbury, MA, USA). undetermined, sample size for each material 00:10:00, centrifugation time

Read fluorescence in the bottom of the plates at fluorescent protein specific wavelenghts in a plate reader Ex: mCherry fluorescent protein Excitation: 575/9 nm Emission: 608/20 nm Gain: 200 Read fluorescence in the bottom of the plates at chlorophyll specific wavelenghts in a plate reader Ex: Chlorophyll Excitation: 440/9 nm Emission: 680/20 nm Gain: 100 *Compare results of the whole culture fluorescence and supernatant fluorescence to estimate secretion efficiency. **Check chlorophyll fluorescence to surveil for contaminations or cell growth failure.
Read cell density by absorbance at 750 nm Cell density can be used to normalize protein fluorescence results, and obtain a estimate of each colony productivity.
creator: Joao Vitor Molino
